---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a gameplay or tooling improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Goal

Describe what gameplay issue/problem this feature addresses.

## Proposed behavior

Describe expected controls, UI, and gameplay behavior.

## Scope

- [ ] Gameplay
- [ ] Content/design
- [ ] UI/HUD
- [ ] Tools/diagnostics
- [ ] Build/release
- [ ] Web support

## Suggested implementation

(Optional) assets, systems, files, or milestone impact.
